candidate_problems.text: What kind of new representation could make the critical line emerge as an invariant, symmetry, or fixed-point property rather than an empirical regularity?
Which existing subsystem pairings around RH are most lossy, and where would a structural bridge most likely yield explanatory closure?
Can the claim that RH is hard because of underintegration be tested by comparison with other major problems that were solved after a unifying representation appeared?
